login.title: Login successful
login.description: You have been logged in successfully.

register.title: Registration successful
register.description: Your account has been created successfully.

logout.title: Logout successful
logout.description: You have been logged out successfully.

token_refreshed.title: Token refreshed successfully
token_refreshed.description: Your access token has been refreshed.

verified.title: Email verified successfully
verified.description: Your email has been verified successfully.

profile.title: Profile retrieved successfully
profile.description: Your profile information has been retrieved successfully.

google_redirect.title: Google redirect ready
google_redirect.description: The Google authentication redirect URL has been generated successfully.

invalid_credentials.title: Invalid credentials
invalid_credentials.description: The identifier or password you entered is incorrect.

invalid_refresh_token.title: Invalid refresh token
invalid_refresh_token.description: The refresh token is invalid or has expired.

email_already_exists.title: Email already exists
email_already_exists.description: An account with this email already exists.

unauthorized.title: Unauthorized
unauthorized.description: You need to be logged in to access this resource.

forbidden.title: Forbidden
forbidden.description: You do not have permission to access this resource.

token_expired.title: Token expired
token_expired.description: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

account_locked.title: Account locked
account_locked.description: Your account has been locked. Please contact support.

google_profile_email_required.title: Google email required
google_profile_email_required.description: Google did not return a verified email address for this profile.

google_oauth_not_configured.title: Google OAuth not configured
google_oauth_not_configured.description: Google OAuth credentials are not configured for this environment.
